transportation coverage rules.description: Questions about how transportation benefits work, including eligibility, limits, and allowed uses.

transportation benefit inquiry.description: General questions about whether transportation benefits are included in the plan.

transportation trip limits.description: Questions about the number of trips, mileage limits, or usage caps for transportation.

transportation vendor options.description: Questions about available transportation providers, vendors, or services that can be used.

transportation ride scheduling or cancel.description: Requests or issues related to booking, modifying, or canceling transportation rides.

transportation ride delays.description: Issues where a scheduled ride is late, delayed, or not arriving on time.

transportation ride failure.description: Issues where a ride did not occur as expected, including no-shows, missed pickups, or dropped service.

community transportation resources.description: Questions about external or community-based transportation support (non-plan services).

food benefit eligibility.description: Questions about whether a member qualifies for food or grocery-related benefits.

food benefit qualification verification.description: Questions about confirming qualification criteria, including income, Medicaid status, or chronic conditions.

food benefit amount changes.description: Questions about increases, decreases, or changes to food benefit amounts.

food benefit usage.description: Questions about how to use food benefits, including eligible items, stores, or spending rules.

food card delivery status.description: Questions about when or whether a food benefit card has been mailed or received.

food card replacement.description: Requests for replacing a lost, stolen, or damaged food benefit card.

food card activation.description: Questions about activating or setting up a food benefit card before use.

food card balance issue.description: Issues with checking, missing, or incorrect benefit balances on the card.

food card transaction errors.description: Problems when the card is declined, not accepted, or does not work at checkout.

community food resources.description: Questions about external food assistance programs (e.g., food banks, SNAP, local services).

gym cost.description: Questions about fees, charges, or out-of-pocket costs related to gym memberships.

gym membership eligibility.description: Questions about whether gym or fitness benefits are included or available under the plan.

gym membership issues.description: Problems using gym benefits, including access issues, billing errors, or denied usage.

gym activation and code.description: Questions about how to activate gym benefits or obtain required access codes.

gym network and locations.description: Questions about which gyms, fitness centers, or locations are included in the network.
